title: Push-Pull Pandas
short_description: Give the panda just the right push to slide across ice, grass or gravel and stop on the flag — too little and friction stops it short, too much and it zooms past.
description: Pip the panda wants to slide along the track and stop exactly on the flag, but the ground fights back: slippery ice barely slows the slide, while rough gravel eats it up. Read the surface, judge the friction, and pick a soft, medium or mighty push so that push minus friction lands Pip right on target — with a gust of wind to plan around in the top band. It's hands-on forces and motion: pushes and pulls, friction on different surfaces, and how a bigger force travels farther. Grade bands ramp from smooth single-square targets, to grippier surfaces and wider judgement, to wind and gravel that make you really think about the forces. Perfect landings and streaks earn bonus points. A free online forces, friction and motion science game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap a push strength to send the panda down the track.
